parts.answer: nickel(II) oxide loses oxygen if two marks not scored: one mark for one pair reversed OR reverse order October/November 2024 Question Answer Marks alkali: potassium hydroxide (1) pH 12: blue (1) • evaporate some of the water / heat to the point of crystallisation / heat until crystals seen • filter off crystals / pick out crystals • dry crystals with filter paper liquid (1) explanation: the energy of the products is higher than the energy of the reactants / the energy of KCl + H O is greater than the energy of KCl (aq) (1) October/November 2024 Question Answer Marks 0.8 0.4 negative electrode: hydrogen (1) regular (1) separation: touching / (close) together (1)
